untranslatable_reason: Complex Head-and-Shoulders Bottom with dual heads and neckline projection requires multi-bar pattern recognition (identifying 5 distinct pivot points, validating symmetry, and projecting neckline forward). Available indicators cannot detect the geometric relationship between two shoulders and two heads simultaneously. Converted to approximate conditions using breakout above 20-day high with prior oversold condition, but this does not capture the true dual-head reversal structure.
